headline: The product story now centers on execution, not abstraction
intro: Each capability should directly support faster delivery, cleaner operations, or a more valuable customer offer.

items.title: AI command routing
items.description: Turn natural language into structured tasks that can be reviewed, approved, and executed safely.
bullets: Routing across content, scripts, and workflows
A clearer bridge from prompt to action

items.title: Repo-backed content system
items.description: Keep pages, offers, pricing, and articles in versioned content files so the business website can evolve quickly without losing control.
bullets: Fast launch of new pages and offers
Reusable structure for SEO and sales

items.title: Automation workflows
items.description: Coordinate repeatable jobs for delivery, internal operations, content publishing, and launch support from the same operating layer.

items.title: Deploy and release ops
items.description: Move work from approved changes into production-ready output with visibility into what changed and what shipped.
